note: Candidate pool for the historic-sourcing track (PROD-14). These are tiered CANDIDATES the SPIKE-01 spike winnows, not 20 confirmed Tier A products. The pool deliberately spans tiers A/B/C so it does not over-promise against the project's roughly 15 to 20 Tier A feasibility ceiling. Selection is editorial by the named criteria in docs/SELECTION-CRITERIA.md, never by a computed transformation metric.

targets.name: Wall's Vienetta
targets.rationale: Long-standing GB frozen dessert often cited for the dairy-cream-to-vegetable-oil compositional shift; an archived historical ice cream formulation looks sourceable from old packaging and trade press.

targets.name: Wall's Soft Scoop (Blue Ribbon)
targets.rationale: Mass-market tub product with a documented move from ice cream to frozen dessert labelling; a historical formulation is plausibly sourceable from archived labels.

targets.name: Wall's Cornetto
targets.rationale: Ubiquitous GB cone product in the ice cream anchor category; category-level reformulation is documentable even where a per-product historical recipe is harder to confirm.

targets.name: Carte D'Or
targets.rationale: Widely stocked tub brand in the ice cream category; reformulation against the compositional rule is documentable at category level pending a sourceable historical recipe.

targets.name: Supermarket own-label soft scoop frozen dessert
targets.rationale: Current-only own-label example of the frozen dessert category, included for category breadth with no historical formulation expected to be sourceable.

targets.name: Lucozade Energy
targets.rationale: GB sports-energy drink with a publicly reported sugar reduction around 2017 ahead of the levy; historical sugar content looks sourceable from contemporaneous reporting and archived labels.

targets.name: Ribena
targets.rationale: Ubiquitous GB blackcurrant drink with a documented pre-levy sugar reduction; a historical formulation is plausibly sourceable from packaging archives and trade coverage.

targets.name: Irn-Bru
targets.rationale: Well-known GB soft drink whose 2018 sugar reduction was widely reported; historical sugar content is well documented and sourceable.

targets.name: Fanta (GB)
targets.rationale: Widely sold GB carbonate reformulated around the levy period; the category-level driver is clear with a per-product historical recipe to confirm.

targets.name: Sprite (GB)
targets.rationale: Ubiquitous GB lemon-lime carbonate in the soft drinks anchor; levy-period reformulation is documentable pending a sourceable historical formulation.

targets.name: Vimto
targets.rationale: Established GB cordial and carbonate brand touched by the levy; reformulation is documentable at category level.

targets.name: Lilt
targets.rationale: Current-only GB carbonate example for category breadth; a historical formulation is not expected to be readily sourceable.

targets.name: Cadbury Dairy Milk
targets.rationale: Widely sold GB moulded chocolate with documented recipe and format changes; a historical formulation is plausibly sourceable from packaging archives and trade press.

targets.name: Cadbury Creme Egg
targets.rationale: GB seasonal confection whose 2015 chocolate-shell change was widely reported; a historical formulation is well documented and sourceable.

targets.name: Terry's Chocolate Orange
targets.rationale: Long-standing GB confection in the chocolate anchor; format and recipe changes are documentable pending a sourceable historical recipe.

targets.name: Toblerone (GB)
targets.rationale: Widely sold in GB with a documented 2016 format change; a per-product historical formulation is to be confirmed against the sugar programme context.

targets.name: Mars bar
targets.rationale: Ubiquitous GB countline relevant to the sugar programme; category-level reformulation is documentable with a historical recipe to source.

targets.name: Quality Street
targets.rationale: Current-only GB confection selection for category breadth; a per-sweet historical formulation is unlikely to be cleanly sourceable.

targets.name: Hovis Wholemeal
targets.rationale: Major GB wrapped loaf within the salt reduction programme; historical salt content looks sourceable from programme reporting and archived nutrition panels.

targets.name: Warburtons Toastie
targets.rationale: Widely stocked GB loaf affected by the salt programme; reformulation is documentable at category level pending a sourceable historical panel.

targets.name: Kingsmill 50/50
targets.rationale: Established GB loaf in the bread anchor; salt and recipe changes are documentable against the programme with a historical panel to confirm.

targets.name: Hovis Best of Both
targets.rationale: Current-only GB loaf example for category breadth; a clean historical formulation is not expected to be readily sourceable.
